# Royalty

> AI-powered loyalty program platform for small businesses. Set up a complete loyalty program in 60 seconds with AI automation, QR check-ins, points, tiers, and smart customer retention. No monthly fees — lifetime plans from $59.

## Why Royalty

Royalty is the loyalty program that works when customers stop showing up — automatically. Unlike rule-based loyalty software (Square Loyalty, Stamp Me) that only tracks points, Royalty uses AI to detect when customers go quiet and triggers personalized win-back campaigns before they're lost.

- **60-second setup** — No hardware, no developer, no onboarding call required
- **No app download** — Customers check in via QR code scan; no install friction
- **AI win-back automation** — Detects lapsed customers and sends behavior-triggered messages (not just "it's been 30 days" timers)
- **Flat lifetime pricing** — $59 one-time, no monthly fees, no per-customer charges
- **Multi-language** — Loyalty programs in 7 languages out of the box

- [Blog](/blog/): Industry insights, retention guides, and loyalty program strategy for small businesses

## About

Royalty is built for small and medium businesses that don't have a dedicated marketing team. The platform handles customer enrollment, point tracking, reward management, and — critically — the automated outreach that brings customers back when they've been quiet. It requires no technical setup, no app for customers, and no ongoing management.

**Best for:** Coffee shops, restaurants, salons, gyms, retail stores, food trucks, and any service business where repeat customers are the business model.

**Not ideal for:** Pure e-commerce businesses (Royalty is optimized for physical check-ins), enterprise/franchise chains (contact us for multi-location pricing), or businesses with fewer than 50 customers.
